content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：迷幻蟲巢之夢，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：迷幻蟲巢之夢
歡迎來到克萊門汀醫生的私人神經療養院，請跟隨醫生的指引，釋放你心靈所有的痛苦，走向最終的痊癒。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Dream of Psychedelic Worm Nest》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Dream of Psychedelic Worm Nest》 
Welcome to Dr. Clementine's private neurological sanatorium. Please follow the doctor's instructions to release all the pain in your heart and move towards ultimate recovery.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：迷幻蟲巢之夢
